title: Minefortress Villagers
description: Have you ever played Mine Fortress? then you know it... the pawns are ugly! and this pack makes them even uglier!!! so why not install it right now?
body:
Have you ever played Mine Fortress? then you know it... the pawns are ugly! and this pack makes them even uglier!!! so why not install it right now?

Features:
- Changing the basic pawn skin to a villager
- That's Literally all it does
